questions.question: State the main difference between a linear regression model and a logistic regression model. Provide one key assumption that is unique to each model.

A company claims that the price of its product (X) is directly related to the amount of advertising spent (Y). If they want to use linear regression to investigate this relationship, what should be the dependent variable (Y) and the independent variable (X)? Explain your answer with a suitable example.

Consider a model that predicts the probability of a customer purchasing a car based on the number of previous purchases (independent variable) and the cost of the car (independent variable). Which type of regression analysis should be used for this problem and why? Explain your answer with a suitable example.
